本頁整合 Parecoxib Sodium 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：For the short-term treatment of postoperative pain in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（99.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（99.4%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.1%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（98.7%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（98.6%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.3%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（98.3%）</li>
<li>benign prostatic hyperplasia (disease)（98.2%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（97.9%）</li>
<li>alopecia（97.9%）</li>
<li>peripheral vascular disease（97.8%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（97.8%）</li>
<li>fibromyalgia（97.7%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（97.7%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（97.7%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（97.7%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（97.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
